headline: American Water (AWK) Completes Hopewell Water System Deal And Starts Drought Campaign
summary: American Water Works Company (NYSE:AWK) has completed its acquisition of Hopewell Borough's water system. The company plans new infrastructure investments in the borough, focusing on regulatory compliance, lead pipe replacement, and PFAS contamination. American Water Works has also launched a public water efficiency campaign in Pennsylvania in response to regional drought concerns. For investors watching regulated utilities, American Water Works Company sits at the intersection of essential...
